item.title: Blade Ball Trails and Cosmetics Guide: All Sword Skins, Trails, and How to Unlock Them (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to all Blade Ball cosmetic items. Learn how to unlock every sword skin, trail, ability effect, and exclusive cosmetic in 2026.
